title: Boy or Girl Gender Reveal Latex Balloons - Vibrant Pink & Blue Balloons (30cm) - Perfect for Baby Showers & Announcements - Pack of 8
features: VIBRANT PINK & BLUE BALLOONS: Our boy or girl gender reveal latex balloons come in eye-catching shades of pink and blue, perfect for creating a festive atmosphere at your baby shower or gender reveal party.

HIGH-QUALITY LATEX MATERIAL: Made from durable, thick and stretchy latex, these 30cm balloons can be filled with air or helium, allowing you to create stunning balloon arrangements that last throughout your event.

PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWERS: Add that extra sparkle to your celebration with these beautiful balloons, ideal for baby showers, gender reveal parties, and baby announcements - a memorable and fun way to share the great news with your loved ones.
EASY TO INFLATE: Our latex gender reveal balloons are easy to inflate, ensuring a hassle-free setup process, giving you more time to focus on celebrating the upcoming arrival of your little one.

PACK OF 8 BALLOONS: This affordable pack of 8 high-quality balloons gives you the perfect quantity to decorate your event space, enhancing the overall visual appeal and creating a lasting impression on your guests.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Gender Reveal Party isn't your style, check out our other elegant options.
